snippet.description:
Bu dizi ve çok daha fazlası puhutv'de → https://puhutv.com/cukur-detay?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=cukur&utm_content=detay

Çukur'a Abone Olmak İçin → https://bit.ly/cukur-dd-sub

4.Sezon 29. Bölüm Özet:

Yamaç’ın hamlesiyle büyük bir darbe alan Amca, Yamaç’a yardım eden herkesi cezalandırmak için harekete geçecek. Bu durum hem Çukur’da hem de Koçovalı ailesinde taşları yerinden oynatacak. Yamaç ve Efsun’un yüzleşmesi duygu dolu anlar yaşatırken Akın’ın gizemli hamlesi ise merak uyandıracak. Amca ve Yamaç arasındaki çekişme Vartolu ile Yamaç’ı karşı karşıya getirecek.

snippet.title: Kardeşlerim 4. Bölüm
snippet.description:
4.Bölüm Özeti: 
“Benim abim dağ gibi kucaklar hayatı, öyle kocaman elleri…”
Nebahat doğum günü partisinde yaşananlardan sonra çocukları zora sokacak bir karar alırken, Şengül olayların üstünü örtmek için eline geçen kozla Nebahat ’in karşına dikilir. Ömer ve Oğulcan’ın başındaki bela, Kadir’in de başını derde sokar. Harika, intikam almak için Aybike’yi oyuna getirirken, kendisinin yaşayacağı şokla altüst olur. Kadir, tam beladan kurtulduklarını düşünürken, kardeşler beklenmedik bir olayla sarsılırlar.

Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halil Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

Kardeşlerim kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

snippet.title: Tuğçe Kandemir - Ah Ellerim Kırılaydı
snippet.description:
'' Ah Ellerim Kırılaydı '' tüm dijital platformlarda!

Söz - Müzik: Tuğçe Kandemir
Düzenleme: Özkan Meydan, Alican Özbuğutu
Mix Mastering: Dijital Meydan
Solo Keman: Kadir Okyay
Grup Keman: İstanbul Strings
Yönetmen: Celal Canik, Soner Karakuş
Backstage: Şeref Kaner Dönder
Prodüksiyon: RepoFilm
Color: Ercan Küçük (ThePostBrothers)

'' Ah Ellerim Kırılaydı '' sözleri ile;

Güzeldi gördüm gözleri.
Uzaktan uzaktan .
Haberim yoktu benim böyle bi tuzaktan. 
Geçtim günahını ,
Yazdım sabahlara kadar .
Gezdik sokakları ,
Güneşler doğana kadar .
Bilemedim ayrılırsın .
Başkasına katlanırsın.
Bi özler kahrolursun.
Olmadı .
Unutupta gizlice ,
Elim gider telefona.
Yıllar geçti aradan ,
Arasam mı bu gece ? 

Ah !ellerim kırılaydı ...
O numara ben unutaydım .
Gözlerini kurutaydım.
Seni öyle arasaydım.
Ben seni nereden aradım?
O sesini duydum.
Durdum durdum.
Şeytana uydum.

Bilemedim ayrılırsın .
Başkasına katlanırsın.
Bi özler kahrolursun.
Olmadı .
Unutupta gizlice ,
Elim gider telefona.
Yıllar geçti aradan ,
Arasam mı bu gece ? 

Ah !ellerim kırılaydı ...
O numara ben unutaydım .
Gözlerini kurutaydım.
Seni öyle arasaydım.
Ben seni nereden aradım?
O sesini duydum.
Durdum durdum.
Şeytana uydum.

Bu kanaldaki tüm eserlerin telif hakları MEDIADEVY tarafından korunmakta olup, tekrar yükleme, remix gibi hiç bir çalışmada kullanılmasına izin verilmemektedir.

#TuğçeKandemir #AhEllerimKırılaydı

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - they’re only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

It’s Saturday morning, so you know what time it is… Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

We’ve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing who’s in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think it’ll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lambo’s bonnet, you’ll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that’s not all… The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

.............................................................

Tiktok - https://www.tiktok.com/@carwow

Facebook – http://www.facebook.com/carwowuk

Twitter – http://www.twitter.com/carwowuk

Sign Up to our Newsletter – http://bit.ly/carwow-Newsletter

Compare the five best offers by price, location and dealer ratings and choose the one that’s right for you – no hassle, no haggling, just a great deal.

Under the Lambo’s bonnet, you’ll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that’s not all… The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

snippet.title: سلام ۱۴۰۰- جشن نوروز و بزرگترین برنامه تفریحی / Salam 1400 - Biggest Entertainment Show of Nowruz
snippet.description:
این ویژه برنامه نوروزی سال ۱۴۰۰ را با میزبانی مجیب عارض و سحر صفدری، مهمانان ویژه و اجرا های ویژه فوق العاده زیبا تماشا کنید!🤩🤩

در این برنامه هنرمندان نامدار و خوش آواز مثل استاد وحید قاسمی، شرافت پروانی، اجمل ذهین، شریف ساحل، وحید روهام بهترین و شاد ترین آهنگ های افغانی را با خود داریم.🤩❤

شهرزاد اکبر از اتفاقات سال گذشته قصه میکند و رضا محمدی دکلمه اشعار زیبای بهاری را برایتان دارد.❤❤

همچنان تماشای اتن پرشور جوانان ځاځي، رقص زیبای قاشق بازی توسط بانوان جوزجانی، طنز های جالب و بخش های جذاب و دیدنی دیگر را فراموش نکنید!🤩❤

نوروز و سال نو به همه شما مبارک!❤


محصولات انحصاری افغانی مانند برنامه های تلویزیونی حقیقی (ستاره افغان) سریال های تلویزیونی، گفتگوها، طنزها و دیگر برنامه های انحصاری پر محتوا را از شبکه های رسمی پایین تماشا کنید 

Subscribe for exclusive Afghan productions such as reality TV shows (Afghan Star) TV Drama Series, Talk shows, Comedies, Cooking Shows and a lot of extra exclusive content!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Official YouTube Channel | http://www.youtube.com/TOLOTV
| Official Facebook | http://www.facebook.com/TOLOTV
| Official Instagram | http://www.instagram.com/tolotvofficial
| Official Twitter | http://www.twitter.com/TOLO_TV

Watch TOLO TV on Yahsat /: http://tolo.tv/new-satelite-provider-and-frequency

TOLO TV is the leading general entertainment TV Channel in Afghanistan. TOLO TV shows are made locally or acquired globally and are all dubbed in Dari

snippet.title: 'PRANK OP DOCENT GAAT FOUT🤕' | UPDATE 21 | BRUGKLAS S9
snippet.description:
Elke week kun je een update bekijken over wat er allemaal gebeurd is afgelopen week in Brugklas! Deze week zagen we dat Iris wilde afrekenen met Jara op een wel heel bijzondere manier. Gelukkig greep Sophie in. We zagen een speciale gast op het KWAC: schrijfster Mel Wallis de Vries! Liz bleek een schrijftalent te zijn. We zagen dat Levi niet meer alleen is, zijn vrienden staan voor hem en zijn vader klaar. Én Noami maakte het uit met Pieter...

snippet.title: Douzi Sabbara ( Official Video - 2021 ) دوزي صبارة
snippet.description:
Douzi Sabbara ( Official Video - 2021 ) دوزي صبارة
Subscribe to Douzi Official Channel: http://bit.ly/douziofficial

  كلمات والحان وتوزيع جلال الحمداوي

"صبّارة" هو كليب يصدره الفنان دّوزي احتفالاً باليوم العالمي للمرأة؛ واعترافا لما تقدمه هاته الأخيرة من تضحيات جسيمة خلال جميع مراحل حياتها. الأغنية التي اختيرت لتكون جينيريك المسلسل المغربي (أولاد المرسى)، هي من توقيع المايسترو جلال الحمداوي على مستوى الكلمة واللحن والتوزيع، ومن إخراج المبدع مراد الخوضي، الكليب يعرف مشاركة نخبة من أبطال المسلسل، نذكر من بينهم عزيز داداس، ماجدولين الإدريسي، أمين الناجي، ناصر أقباب ,كليلة بونعيلات وآخرون.. الجدير بالذكر أن صبارة إلى جانب مسلسل أولاد المرسى، يعالجان في طياتهما العديد من المشاكل الاجتماعية داخل قالب درامي متجدد

●▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬●

العنوان:صبارة
غناء: دوزي 
عارفك صبارة و قاسيتي لعذاب

localized.title: Douzi Sabbara ( Official Video - 2021 ) دوزي صبارة
localized.description:
Douzi Sabbara ( Official Video - 2021 ) دوزي صبارة
Subscribe to Douzi Official Channel: http://bit.ly/douziofficial

  كلمات والحان وتوزيع جلال الحمداوي

"صبّارة" هو كليب يصدره الفنان دّوزي احتفالاً باليوم العالمي للمرأة؛ واعترافا لما تقدمه هاته الأخيرة من تضحيات جسيمة خلال جميع مراحل حياتها. الأغنية التي اختيرت لتكون جينيريك المسلسل المغربي (أولاد المرسى)، هي من توقيع المايسترو جلال الحمداوي على مستوى الكلمة واللحن والتوزيع، ومن إخراج المبدع مراد الخوضي، الكليب يعرف مشاركة نخبة من أبطال المسلسل، نذكر من بينهم عزيز داداس، ماجدولين الإدريسي، أمين الناجي، ناصر أقباب ,كليلة بونعيلات وآخرون.. الجدير بالذكر أن صبارة إلى جانب مسلسل أولاد المرسى، يعالجان في طياتهما العديد من المشاكل الاجتماعية داخل قالب درامي متجدد

●▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬●

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won’t be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: MILAN KNOL & DUTCH PERFORMANTE STROOIEN MET GELD - GELDROVERS | Gierige Gasten
snippet.description:
Exclusieve auto’s, helikopters en de duurste huizen én kastelen van Nederland. In deze aflevering ervaren de Gierige Gasten eindelijk hoe het is om te zwemmen in het geld. Welk team lukt het om op de foto te gaan met de meest waardevolle spullen? Milan Knol & Chahid Charrak aka Dutch Performante dagen de Gierige Gasten uit voor €449! #GierigeGasten #Geldrovers #MilanKnol #Knollergang #DutchPerformante

Met dank aan De Fabrique (https://defabrique.nl/).

Minder betalen, meer leven!
Abonneer op ons kanaal voor alle gratis tips: http://bit.ly/subGierigeGasten

Blijf op de hoogte van onze avonturen via:
http://www.instagram.com/gierigegasten

Volg ons ook op Instagram op:
http://www.instagram.com/gierigegasten
http://www.instagram.com/nielsoosthoek
http://www.instagram.com/martijnmanschot
http://www.instagram.com/fitboyjossa

Check ons ook op KIJK: 
http://www.kijk.nl/gierigegasten

Wij, Gierige Gasten, vinden het leven al duur genoeg. Daarom plaatsen wij elke dinsdag op 16:00 uur een nieuwe video waarin wij shit voor weinig of helemaal gratis regelen. En omdat we tegenwoordig geld krijgen van ome John, kunnen we af en toe ook een 'échte' serie maken, die zie je elke donderdag om 16:00 uur! Noem ons gierig, karig, inhalig, krenterig, hebzuchtig, knijperig of zelfs schraperig. Wij noemen het slim!

snippet.title: Veille de France-Ukraine à Clairefontaine, Equipe de France I FFF 2021
snippet.description:
A la veille du mach contre l'Ukraine au Stade de France, les hommes de Didier Deschamps ont effectué une dernière séance à Clairefontaine. Découvrez les images de l'échauffement des gardiens de but et de la séance de vivacité des joueurs de champ. 

Tous les buts, les résumés, les inside, de toutes les sélections, la Coupe de France, le foot féminin, le futsal, le beach soccer, le foot amateur, la formation, les championnats de National, D1 Arkema, D1 Futsal... ne ratez rien et abonnez-vous à notre chaine.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FFF : https://www.fff.fr
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/fff
Twitter :  https://www.twitter.com/FFF

EQUIPES DE FRANCE : https://www.fff.fr/equipes-de-france 
Facebook :  https://www.facebook.com/equipedefrance
Snapchat :  http://po.st/SnapchatEdF
Twitter :  https://www.twitter.com/equipedefrance  
Instagram :  https://www.instagram.com/equipedefrance 

Coupe de France : https://www.fff.fr/coupes 
Facebook :  https://www.facebook.com/coupedefranc... 
Twitter :  https://www.twitter.com/coupedefrance 

CHAMPIONNAT NATIONAL : http://po.st/yTSGBt 
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/nationalFFF  

CNF CLAIREFONTAINE :  http://www.cnf-clairefontaine.com 
Facebook :  https://www.facebook.com/fff
Twitter :  https://www.twitter.com/FFF
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

La Fédération Française de Football (F.F.F.) est une association loi de 1901 qui a pour mission:
- d'organiser la pratique du football, sous toutes ses formes;
- d’établir les règles techniques;
- de délivrer les titres et gérer les sélections nationales;
- de procéder à la délivrance des licences;
- de définir et de mettre en œuvre un projet global de formation;
- de défendre les intérêts du football français.
#Fiersdetrebleus

snippet.title: 6 fois où Pierre Ménès a complètement dérapé | Oh My Goal
snippet.description:
Le documentaire de Marie Portolano et Guillaume Priou "Je ne suis pas une salope, je suis une journaliste" fait énormément parler. Le média Les Jours affirme que la rédaction de Canal+ aurait bloqué une partie du documentaire pour protéger certaines personnes. 

Parmi ces personnes figureraient Pierre Ménès, dont les dérapages sont nombreux. Voici d'ailleurs 6 fois où Pierre Ménès a complètement dérapé. 

La rédaction d'Oh My Goal tient à féliciter Marie Portolano et Guillaume Priou pour ce documentaire "Je ne suis pas une salope, je suis une journaliste". 

Un grand bravo également à Estelle Denis, Isabelle Moreau, Vanessa Le Moigne, Isabelle Ithurburu, Tiffany Henne, Cécile Grès, Clémentine Sarlat, Margot Dumont, Nathalie Ianetta, Lucie Bacon, Charlotte Namura, Amaia Cazenave, Frédérique Galametz, Mary Patrux et Laurie Delhostal pour leur témoignage et leur courage. 

---------------------------------------

N’oublie pas de liker, de commenter et de partager cette vidéo. Toutes les remarques sont bonnes à prendre, nous n’hésiterons pas à utiliser tes retours pour nos prochaines vidéos. Active les notifications si tu ne veux rien louper sur Oh My Goal - France. 

Suis-nous sur toutes les plateformes :
YouTube - Oh My Goal - France : http://bit.ly/2kgAwTi
YouTube - Oh My Goal - Actu Foot : http://bit.ly/2m5rQQ4
YouTube - Les Grandes Questions du Foot : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCkp-OMM0nbpES6wpyW6Jj3w
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/ohmygoalfr.kelinetwork/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/ohmygoal_fr/
Twitter : https://twitter.com/ohmygoal_fr
TikTok : https://www.tiktok.com/@ohmygoalfrance

snippet.title: Kan je €10.000 maken in 10 dagen met Cryptotraden  - #NIEUWSGIERIG​ | Gierige Gasten
snippet.description:
Grote huizen, luxe auto's en dure horloges. Wij komen dit regelmatig tegen op social media met de belofte dat ook jij je deze levensstijl kan veroorloven wanneer je gaat cryptotraden. Joost nam de proef op de som en zette €2.000 van zijn eigen geld op het spel om te kijken of dit ook echt zo is. Lukt het hem €10.000 te maken? Check het nu in deze nieuwe #NIEUWSGIERIG video!

Minder betalen, meer leven!
Abonneer op ons kanaal voor alle gratis tips: http://bit.ly/subGierigeGasten

Wij maken deze video, zodat jij dit niet hoeft te doen. Deze video vormt op geen enkele manier financieel advies.

Wil je meer leren over traden, investeren, of de cryptocurrency markets? 
Volg Michaël dan hier! 
Twitter : https://twitter.com/CryptoMichNL

Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/c/cryptomichael
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cryptomichnl/

Disclaimer: Euronext handelt niet in cryptocurrency of is op op geen enkele andere wijze hieraan of aan de productie van deze video verbonden.

Blijf op de hoogte van onze avonturen via:
http://www.instagram.com/gierigegasten

Volg ons ook op Instagram op:
http://www.instagram.com/gierigegasten
http://www.instagram.com/nielsoosthoek
http://www.instagram.com/martijnmanschot
http://www.instagram.com/fitboyjossa

Check ons ook op KIJK: 
http://www.kijk.nl/gierigegasten

Wij, Gierige Gasten, vinden het leven al duur genoeg. Daarom plaatsen wij elke dinsdag op 16:00 uur een nieuwe video waarin wij shit voor weinig of helemaal gratis regelen. En omdat we tegenwoordig geld krijgen van ome John, kunnen we af en toe ook een 'échte' serie maken, die zie je elke donderdag om 16:00 uur! Noem ons gierig, karig, inhalig, krenterig, hebzuchtig, knijperig of zelfs schraperig. Wij noemen het slim!

snippet.title: Imagine Dragons - Follow You (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen to Follow You + Cutthroat, out now: https://smarturl.it/FollowYouCutthroat​​

Directed by Matt Eastin

Shop Imagine Dragons: http://smarturl.it/ImagineDragonsShop​​​
Sign up for email updates: http://smarturl.it/ID_Email​​​
Listen to Imagine Dragons on Spotify: http://smarturl.it/ID_Discography​​​

Follow Imagine Dragons:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ImagineDragons
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Imaginedragons​​​
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/imaginedragons
YouTube: https://youtube.com/imaginedragons​​
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@imaginedragons​

Lyrics:

You know I got your number number all night
I’m always on your team, I got your back alright
Taking those taking those losses if it treats you right
I want to put you into the spotlight
If the world would only know what you’ve been holding back
Heart attacks every night
Oh you know it’s not right

I’ll follow you way down wherever you may go
I’ll follow you way down to your deepest low
I’ll always be around wherever life takes you
You know I’ll follow you

Call you up, you’ve been cryin’ cryin’ all night
You’re only disappointed in yourself alright
Taking those taking those losses if it treats you right
I wanna take you into the sunlight
If the world would only know what you’ve been holding back
Heart attacks every night
Oh you know it’s not right

I’ll follow you way down wherever you may go
I’ll follow you way down to your deepest low
I’ll always be around wherever life takes you
You know I’ll follow you
You know I’ll follow you
Wherever life takes you, you know I’ll follow you

You're not the type to give yourself enough love
She live her life, hand in a tight glove
I wish that I could fix it, I could fix it for you
But instead I’ll be right here comin’ through
(Right here, comin’ through)

I’ll follow you way down wherever you may go
I’ll follow you way down to your deepest low
I’ll always be around wherever life takes you
You know I’ll follow you
You know I’ll follow you
Wherever life takes you, you know I’ll follow you

snippet.title: 400 km/u in PEPERDURE Nissan?! | Daily Driver | DAY1
snippet.description:
Deze Nissan GTR met rond de 2000pk breekt alle wetten van de natuur!! Vandaag zijn Jay-Jay en Job te gast bij Total Car Concept waar misschien wel de vetste en snelste auto's van ons land staan... Een en al genieten geblazen dus!

Kaarten DAY1 WORLD OF CARS! https://www.day1worldofcars.com 

DAY1 WORLD OF CARS Instagram https://instagram.com/day1worldofcars?igshid=1u62qb1ianqcu

Kijk iedere zaterdag om 11:00 een nieuwe aflevering van DAY1!

Meepraten over deze video? Kom gezellig in onze Discord server!
🔷Discord: https://discord.gg/StgPaEXC7c

Shop nu jouw favoriete auto parfum of doping-vrije voedingssupplementen hier:
🔷 XONE: https://xone.nl
🔷 The Car Parfum: https://www.thecarparfum.com 


Shout-out naar het team achter de schermen:
🔷 Camera: Thijs Ahsmann - @Thijsahsmann
🔷 Edit: Dario Ferraro - @Dazzerzz
🔷 Animatie/design: @studio.stilt
🔷 Muziek: https://open.spotify.com/user/jayjayboske?si=TGMqi-cJTx63p8srmNw4Pw

Volg ons op Instagram:
🔷 @day1lifestyle
🔷 @day1worldofcars
🔷 @jayjayboske
🔷 @djlafuente

Check hier onze wekelijkse DAY1 podcast:  
🔷 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/19Aoq5eiE0yVwP1nlM5ufc
🔷 Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/day1lifestyle 
🔷 Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/nl/podcast/day1-podcast/id1504234285

Kom jij ook naar hét auto event van het jaar?
Koop jouw tickets nu via https://www.day1worldofcars.com

ENJOY, LIKE & SUBSCRIBE! #DAY1 

Elke dag is een nieuwe kans om beter te worden dan dat je gister was, om meer uit het leven te halen en de mensen om je heen te inspireren. DAY1 staat voor de kans die zich iedere dag voordoet om alles uit jouw dag te halen. Hard werken, nooit opgeven en genieten van jouw succes. Vandaag is de dag om te laten zien dat niets onmogelijk is.

snippet.title: Suzan & Freek - Goud (Officiële Video)
snippet.description:
Officiële video van Suzan & Freek - Goud
 
Download of stream: https://SuzanFreek.lnk.to/Goud 
 
Volg Suzan & Freek
Instagram - https://instagram.com/suzanenfreek
Tiktok - https://vm.tiktok.com/vNFXMD/ 
Facebook - https://facebook.com/suzanenfreek
Website - https://www.suzanenfreek.nl
 
Credits:
Creatieve directie: Roel Welling
Strategie: Ruben Cusell
Regie/camera: Dennis Lubbers
Showrunner: Rogier Sol
Productiemanager: Maaike Raat
Productieassistent: Senne HartsKeerl
Edit: Dennis Lubbers
Edit: Björn Mentink
Grading: Dennis Lubbers 
 
 
Tekst:
 
Als je mijn gedachten eens kon zien
Dan stond ik niet alleen misschien
Ik heb eigenlijk nooit echt gedacht
Dat dit al het einde was
 
Zeg me, is het wederzijds
Als ik bang ben om alleen te zijn
Hield ik misschien te snel van jou
Ik dacht dat het werken zou
 
Ik had het ook niet zo bedacht, weet dat jij niet bij me past
Heb het zo vaak geprobeerd en ik wou dat het anders was
 Heb er zo hard in geloofd en ik weet jij deed dat ook
Toen kwam jij met de klap… misschien is het beter zo
 
Maar we waren toch goud, zeg me wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
Nu ineens ben je weg, maar het voelt nog niet echt alsof ik dit kan
Denk je dat het makkelijk is ofzo
Je spookt door m'n hoofd omdat ik nog steeds in ons geloof
Maar we waren toch goud, zeg me wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
Wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
 
Zwijgen we de hele dag
Wil jij weer praten, hele nacht
Juist als ik denk dat we beter gaan
Zijn wij weer het huis met de lampen aan
 
Aan uit aan uit, we gaan ervoor
Zwart beeld, de stoppen slaan weer door
En al die tijd had ik nog hoop
We hadden het toch beloofd?
 
Ik had het ook niet zo bedacht, weet dat jij niet bij me past
Heb het zo vaak geprobeerd, en ik wou dat het anders was
 
Heb er zo hard in geloofd, en ik weet jij deed dat ook
Toen kwam jij met de klap… misschien is het beter zo
 
Maar we waren toch goud, zeg me wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
Nu ineens ben je weg, maar het voelt nog niet echt alsof ik dit kan
Denk je dat het makkelijk is ofzo
Je spookt door m'n hoofd omdat ik nog steeds in ons geloof
Maar we waren toch goud, zeg me wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
Wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
 
Wat als ik dit niet alleen meer kan?
Wat als ik jou niet vergeten kan
Was je wat langer gebleven dan, oooh
 
Maar we waren toch goud, zeg me wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
Nu ineens ben je weg, maar het voelt nog niet echt alsof ik dit kan
Denk je dat het makkelijk is ofzo

snippet.title: خبر عاجل.. الجالية المغربية تفاجئ الجالية المغربية بهدا القرار الغير متوقع
snippet.description:
إشترك في قناة اخبار بالعربي الرسمية: https://bit.ly/2RUQjnr
شاهد المزيد على موقع اخبار بالعربي: https://bit.ly/2GtYGku
ضع اعجاب في صفحتنا على الفيسبوك : https://bit.ly/38KdYxD
--------------------------------------------------------
قناةاخبار بالعربي هي قناة عربية نطرح فيها العديد من البرامج بشكل يومي نشارككم فيها أخبار شائعة و مختلفة كذالك نقدم لكم قصص متنوعة و فيديوهات ثقافية وايضا نطرح لكم كل ما هو جديد في عالم التقنية و التكنولوجيا و كذالك فيديوهات تحفيزية و ردود أفعال على فيديوهات شائعة و المزيد من المواضيع و البرامج الحصرية التي لن تشاهدها الا على قناة اخبار بالعربي
حسنا إن أعجبتك قناتنا قم بالإشتراك والضغط على 🔔 ليصلك كل جديد
#اخبار_بالعربي
#اخبار_بالعربي - arab_news
#arab_news

snippet.title: Maroon 5 - Beautiful Mistakes ft. Megan Thee Stallion (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
“Beautiful Mistakes” featuring Megan Thee Stallion is out now: https://maroon5.lnk.to/BeautifulMistakes​
 
For more, visit: 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/maroon5​
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maroon5​
Twitter: https://twitter.com/maroon5​
Sign up for updates: http://smarturl.it/Maroon5.News​ 

 // 
 
LYRICS
 
It’s beautiful it’s bittersweet
You’re like a broken home to me
I take a shot of memories and black out like an empty street
I fill my days with the way you walk
And fill my nights with broken dreams
I make up lies inside my head
Like one day you’ll come back to me

Now I’m not holding on
Not holding on
Not holding on
I’m just depressed that you’re gone
Not holding on

snippet.title: Tikkende tijdbom: de volgende mega-aardbeving
snippet.description:
Precies tien jaar geleden kreeg Japan een van de zwaarste aardbevingen ooit over zich heen, met een tsunami en een kernramp erbovenop. De vraag is: waar komt de volgende mega-aardbeving? Want dat die komt, dat is zeker. Leggen we je uit. 

Luister ook naar onze podcast, Lang verhaal kort, in je favoriete podcast-app! Ook op Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3Ab6DGFJL7VE5ToIH4r6w1?si=DqrwE6L2TvOb99FF1D2d3A

Meer video’s? Abonneer je op ons kanaal en praat mee! https://bit.ly/2PJk8Xg

Volg NOS op 3 ook op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nosop3

We bedanken hoogleraar seismologie Arwen Deuss van de Universiteit Utrecht voor haar deskundige feedback op het script. In deze video van de Universiteit van Nederland legt zij uit waarom de wetenschap nog niet zo ver is dat het kan voorspellen wanneer aardbevingen gebeuren: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q-E5PoOE8Q0 

Muziek:
Noria - 'Seashore'
Rujay - 'Bad Dreams'
Rujay - 'On Ice'

---------------------------------------------------------------

● VRAGEN/TIPS/IDEEËN? We horen graag wat jij van het nieuws en onze uitleg vindt, laat je horen in de comments! Of mail ons: nosop3@nos.nl 

● VOLG ONS OOK HIER: Facebook: https://facebook.com/nosop3 Twitter: http://twitter.com/nosop3

___________________________________________________

De NOS is de grootste nieuwsorganisatie van Nederland. Bij NOS op 3 vind je elke zaterdag nieuws dat je niet mag hebben gemist. Wij gaan voor jou op onderzoek uit naar nieuws uit jouw wereld. Ook vind je hier uitleg bij het nieuws.

#Japan #aardbeving

en.title: The next megathrust earthquake, when?
en.description: Exactly ten years ago, Japan suffered one of the worst earthquakes ever, with a tsunami and a nuclear disaster on top. The question is, where will the next mega earthquake be? Because it will come, that's for sure.

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

Lyrics LGHADI WEHDOU : 

الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة  
الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة فين غابو عليك الصيادة 

واا لي ما عندو المال ما يتزوج وااه الالة 
واا لي ما عندو المال ما يتزوج ما يجيب بنات الرجالة 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة فين غابو عليك الصيادة 

وا الكلام لي قلت أنا وياك واااه ألالة 
الكلام لي قلت انا وياك أش قالو فيه الدواية 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة فين غابو عليك الصيادة 

أنا والزين ما نتفرقوش وا ه يا لالة 
ويلا الفراق جا جابو مولانا 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة فين غابو عليك الصيادة 

الزين امازيغ ايرا لقلبي واه ايا مركي 
انت نوكان ايلان تيكي واه ايا وينوي 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة في غابو عليك الصيادة 

يهديك الله أ لغادي وحدو واه أ لالة 
يهديك الله أ لغادي وحدو  ياك أنا نمشي بهوايا 

وا الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة .. واه ألالة 
و الغزالة لي سارحة فالغابة في غابو عليك الصيادة 

للا نزهة يا ضي عيني واه ا للا 
للا نزهة يا ميمتي و للي بغيتيه نديرو غير رضاي عليا

وا هيا مول الحكايم 
سيدي عبد الله بلحساين

وا ضيف الله  أ مول المراح
هاكا حمادا تال الصباح 

 وا هاكا حمادا تال الصباح 
وا هاكا حمادا تال الصباح


#Saad_Lamjarred #LGHADI_WEHDOU #سعد_لمجرد

snippet.title: I Hitchhiked the World's Deadliest Train (20hrs across the Sahara)
snippet.description:
Become smarter in 5 minutes by signing up for free today: http://cen.yt/mbyestheory - Thanks to Morning Brew for sponsoring today’s video.

🙏🏼 Thank you for making these videos possible through your support of Seek Discomfort 
⚡️ SEEK DISCOMFORT: http://seek-discomfort.com/yes-theory

The Mauritanian Railway, one of the world's longest and heaviest train in the world transports iron ore from a remote mining town in Mauritania to a coastal city cutting through the Sahara Desert. The ride lasts anywhere between 19-30 hours and a few brave locals use it to travel back and forth with supplies. The dangerous trek leads to several unfortunate deaths every year as people fall off the train. Thomas and his friend Drew Binsky attempt to find this train and embark on the dangerous journey through the Sahara.

Thank you to Drew Binsky for coming with me and guiding me through how to travel in this part of the world! Check out his channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/user/thehungrypartier

Thank you to our local friend Med for some of the b-roll shots of the train.

✈ Book an Adventure: https://travel.yestheory.com/

JOIN OUR COMMUNITY
⁺ Yes Theory Plus: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTd7KzdwnFE3lm6LCfYDmUQ
📝 Follow Matt’s Newsletter: http://yestheory.com/newsletter/
📸 Instagram -  https://www.instagram.com/yestheory/

localized.title: I Hitchhiked the World's Deadliest Train (20hrs across the Sahara)
localized.description:
Become smarter in 5 minutes by signing up for free today: http://cen.yt/mbyestheory - Thanks to Morning Brew for sponsoring today’s video.

🙏🏼 Thank you for making these videos possible through your support of Seek Discomfort 
⚡️ SEEK DISCOMFORT: http://seek-discomfort.com/yes-theory

The Mauritanian Railway, one of the world's longest and heaviest train in the world transports iron ore from a remote mining town in Mauritania to a coastal city cutting through the Sahara Desert. The ride lasts anywhere between 19-30 hours and a few brave locals use it to travel back and forth with supplies. The dangerous trek leads to several unfortunate deaths every year as people fall off the train. Thomas and his friend Drew Binsky attempt to find this train and embark on the dangerous journey through the Sahara.

Thank you to Drew Binsky for coming with me and guiding me through how to travel in this part of the world! Check out his channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/user/thehungrypartier

Thank you to our local friend Med for some of the b-roll shots of the train.

✈ Book an Adventure: https://travel.yestheory.com/

snippet.title: Les origines de la Grande Muraille de Chine
snippet.description:
Dans notre imaginaire collectif, la Grande Muraille de Chine est un immense mur fortifié en pierre, d’un seul tenant sur plusieurs milliers de kilomètres, et construit par les Chinois pour se défendre face à des invasions barbares. Et les théories les plus loufoques vont jusqu’à affirmer qu’on peut la voir depuis la Lune. Même si c’est faux, ça montre quand même bien l’importance qu’on lui donne, et à quel point on la voit comme un ouvrage massif. Dans cette vidéo on va voir ensemble ce qu’est en réalité ce que nous, Occidentaux, appelons la « Grande Muraille de Chine ».

Cet épisode est sponsorisé par Tianci Média, merci à eux de permettre la production de cette série qui nous fait voyager !

📝 Écrit par Benjamin Brillaud et Tony Livet

Decouvrez la chaîne de Tony Livet : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCazdVZFoe41CsFhHMJp5GUA

➤ Un grand merci à Arnaud Bertrand
🎞 Montage par Dead Will : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtLkNuzB2_j2z7SFdvkiCww
————————————————————————————————————————————
➤➤➤ Sources en fin de description 
————————————————————————————————————————————

➜ Nota Bene, Tome 3 "La mythologie Nordique" (BD aux éditions Soleil) :  
https://tidd.ly/2TwVqvp

***MULTIMEDIA***
➜ Mon PC AORUS par Instinct Gaming : https://bit.ly/AORUSFalconCrewPC
Mes périphériques :

➜ Mon siège AORUS AGC300 : https://bit.ly/AORUSAGC300


➜ Pour en savoir plus :
Bibliographie :
- Hubert Delahaye, Jean-Pierre Drege, Dai Wenbao, Dick Wilson, Luo Zewen, La Grande Muraille, Armand Colin Éditeur, Paris, 1982
- Arthur Waldron, The Great Wall of China: From History to Myth, Cambridge University Press, 1992
- Michel Jan, La Grande Muraille de Chine, Payot, 2003
- Arnaud Bertrand, "La formation de la commanderie impériale de Dunhuang (Gansu) des Han antérieurs : l’apport des sources archéologiques", Arts Asiatiques, vol.70, 2015, p. 63-76. 
- Aurel Stein, “Ancien limes construit par les Chinois sous l'empereur Wou-ti au Nord et à l'Ouest de Toun-houang”, Comptes rendus des séances de l'Académie des Inscriptions et Belles-Lettres,  61-5, 1917,  p. 339-342
- Stephen Turnbull, The Great Wall of China: 221 BC-AD 1644, Osprey Publishing, 2007 

- Un très bon article : https://www.britannica.com/topic/Great-Wall-of-China/The-Han-through-Yuan-dynasties

snippet.title: Benim Adım Melek 57. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Benim Adım Melek 57. Bölüm Özet:

Alpay taburcu olmuştur. Seyit Ali, Halil’i hapisten çıkaracak ifadeyi vermesi durumunda Alpay’a konağın tapusunu devretmekte kararlıdır. Cumali, Seyitali’nin bir şeyler çevirdiğini anlar. Alpay, Seyitali ile yaptığı anlaşmaya engel olmaması için ortadan kaldırmaya karar verdiği Kenan’ı, karşısında görünce ne yapacağını bilemez. Ortadan bir anda kaybolan İdris’in hayatından endişe eden Alpay çareyi kaçmakta bulur. Alpay yaptığı planla Kenan’ın gazabından kurtulacak mı yoksa ava giderken avlanacak mı? Alpay’ın verdiği ifade Halil’i hapisten kurtarmaya yetecek mi?
Ömer Defne ile birlikte Karadağ konağında kalmaya kararlıdır ancak bunu ailelere nasıl söyleyeceklerini bilemezler. Zeynel nişanlısı Ünzile’ye verdiği sözü sonunda tutar. Halfeti’ye doğru yola çıkarlar. Ama Beyhan çifte kumruları yalnız göndermez ve Kerem ile İkra’yı da peşlerine takar. Bu Kerem ile İkra’nın yakınlaşmasına sebep olur.
Zümrüt olanı biteni gizlemeye ve anlayışlı babaanne rolünü sürdürmeye devam etse de Defne’yi kovduğu gerçeğini saklayamaz. Gerçeği öğrenen Vildan ve Cumali’nin tepkilerinden sonra Zümrüt nasıl bir karar verecek? Ailelerinin yaşadığı acılara birbirlerine sarılarak destek olan Mithat ve Seyran’ı bekleyen kötü sürpriz ne?

Benim Adım Melek her Çarşamba günü yeni bölümleri ile saat 20.00'de TRT1'de.


Benim Adım Melek fragmanlar için tıklayın… http://bit.ly/AdimMelekFragmanlar
Benim Adım Melek Resmi Facebook Sayfası (Official Facebook Page): https://www.facebook.com/AdimMelekTRT/
Benim Adım Melek Resmi Twitter Sayfası (Official Twitter Page): https://twitter.com/adimmelektrt
Benim Adım Melek Resmi Instagram Sayfası (Official Instagram Page): https://www.instagram.com/adimmelektrt/
Benim Adım Melek Resmi YouTube Kanalı (Official YouTube Page): http://www.youtube.com/c/AdimMelekTRT

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

#GRAMMYs2021

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

en.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Making a Bond Car Top Gear Collab Part 1
snippet.description:
My name's Furze... Colin Furze haha. Project 00Furze is go with some Bond classics and added Furze/Top Gear gadgets.........Stay tuned for more Firepower and extra devices in the next video.

Make sure you check out the new series of Top Gear with Freddie, Paddy and Chris on BBC One, Sundays at 8pm - or on BBCiPlayer here http://bbc.in/38Tc3JN

And check out the Top Gear https://www.youtube.com/user/TopGear and James Bond https://www.youtube.com/user/jamesbond007 YouTube channels too!

Follow me on Social Media.
Instagram https://www.instagram.com/realcolinfurze/
Twitter https://twitter.com/colin_furze
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/Colin-furze-521680751253584
TikTok https://vm.tiktok.com/JJ8wSTs/

Music

First Track is some Music library James Bond like tune

Tune Over the Top Gear Jazz is called "Light Bulb" by "The Rival"
http://www.twitter.com/bobbyhalick
http://soundcloud.com/therivalmusic

3rd Track is called "Go Hard or Go Home" bu "Plot 32"
https://www.facebook.com/Plot32Band/

4th Track is Called "Run Hide" by "Bedside Manner"

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq6MGJ90VmBXLrBJbbANz-g
Instagram: https://instagram.com/bedsidemannersband?igshid=1awnqonpsx31w
Twitter: https://twitter.com/BedsideOfficial
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bedsidemannersofficial/

5th Track is called "Honey Hold Back" by "St Peters Dream"
https://instagram.com/stpetersdream?igshid=1l8ya57f05sqo

6th Track is Classical Handel by "Look Mum No Computer"

7th Track is called "Mirrors" by "Wolfs"

snippet.title: Hercai 64. Bölüm
snippet.description:
64. Bölüm Özeti 🦋
Miran, Reyyan’ın ölümle yüz yüze geldiğini öğrenir. Bütün olanların sorumlusu Füsun’dur ve Miran ona bedel ödetecektir.  Ve Reyyan’ın hastalığı, Hazar ve Azize arasında yeni bir kapıyı açar. İntikam almak için Cihan’a anlaşma teklif eden Füsun, Şadoğlu ailesini bir arada tutan her şeyi, tek tek yok etmeye yemin eder. Reyyan’ı kurtarmak için çabalayan Miran, vakıfta çıkan yangınla sarsılır. Cihan, Füsun’un anlaşma teklifini kabul edecek mi? Azize, yıllar sonra kavuştuğu oğlu Hazar’la arasındaki duvarları yıkmayı başarabilecek mi? Büyük bir kaosun ortasında kalan Reyyan, canı pahasına doğurmak istediği Umut’tan vazgeçmek zorunda kalacak mı?

Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için bu kanala katılın:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join 

“İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi”

Yapımcılığını, Mia Yapım Banu Akdeniz üstlendiği, "İntikamdan doğan imkansız bir aşkın hikayesi" mottosuyla yola çıkan Hercai'nin başrollerini Akın Akınözü, Ebru Şahin, Gülçin Santıroğlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Özer, Oya Unustası, Tansu Taşanlar ve  İlay Erkök paylaşıyor.

Hercai YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://bit.ly/2vwmORD

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQttps://goo.gl/dmrDLN

Hercai Web Sayfası; https://goo.gl/ziLDeQ

#Hercai #AkınAkınözü #EbruŞahin

snippet.description:

Follow KSI 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ksi/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/KSIOlajidebt/

Follow YUNGBLUD

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/yungblud/?hl=en 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/yungblud/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/yungblud?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/polo.capalot/?hl=en 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pologofficial/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Polo_Capalot?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AgTAQt8XS6jRWi4sX7w49?si=YTISKuMXQ92gSOXmi5m_Gw 

Lyrics: 

KSI
Little bit  little bit 
I Need a little bit of patience
Coz we be going through changes
 
Polo G
Ah, ah no patience i’ve had enough.
Spent too much time through these phases, it’s just not adding up
Felt all alone on those stages.
Wanna get my passion up,
It’s over, pack it up
Don’t walk away from me.
When the night falls, make the right call.
Or she’ll be gone forever.
 
Yungblud
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos we’ve been going through changes
I need a little bit of patience
Get out of crazy situations
And my heart won’t change
If my head don’t break
I need a little bit of patience
Cos we’ve been going through changes
 
KSI
Woooooahhhhhh
Need a little space to slow the brain
I don’t really wanna feel the pain.
Seen a lot of shit to make me hate
I don’t wanna hide until it’s too late
Feels like i’m gonna break
 
Yungblud
I need a little bit of patience\
Cos we’ve been going through changes
I need a little bit of patience
Get out of crazy situations

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Recap
snippet.description:
On March 3, Starship serial number 10 (SN10) completed SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype as it successfully ascended, transitioned propellant, and reoriented itself for reentry and an active aerodynamic controlled descent. SN10’s Raptor engines reignited to perform the vehicle’s landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad.

Test flights such as SN10’s are about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.
